privileged_info_summary: This task creates a volumetric spotlight scene in Blender. Verified task specifications: The output blend file is saved to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/volumetric_scene.blend and the rendered image to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/volumetric_render.png. The volumetric fog domain density must be in the range [0.01, 1.0]. The world background brightness (measured by perceptual luminance formula) must be less than 0.15. The render engine must be set to CYCLES. The task data is synthetic, procedurally generated by Blender Python scripts with no external data sources. One metadata claim (min_spot_energy: 50.0) is unverified as it is not enforced by the verifier, and the task description contradicts it by stating '500W+'.
